pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point to browse water products, dispensers, deals, and account tools with global search.
primary_functions: Provide quick access to Shop Water, Dispensers & Coolers, Deals, Help Center, and My Account sections
Allow users to search for products using the header search bar
Show featured products and promotions with links to product detail or deals pages

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Shop Water" in main hero section or header navigation
Click "Dispensers & Coolers" in hero tiles or header navigation
Submit search form in header (searchTerm is user-entered query)
Click a featured product card
Click a featured promotion or "View all deals" link
Click cart icon in header
Click "My Account" in header navigation
Click "Help" in header navigation
Click "About" in footer
Click "Contact" in footer
Click "My Subscriptions" in footer
Click "Upcoming Deliveries" in footer

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Home" link in the header navigation
Default landing page when visiting index.html or the site root

pages.name: Product Listing
pages.description: Category and search results page for browsing bottled water and dispenser products with filters and sorting.
primary_functions: Display lists of products for a category (e.g., water, dispensers) or search query with pagination
Provide filters for size, type (still, sparkling, spring), packaging, eco-friendly tags, price range, and rating
Allow users to sort results (e.g., Price: Low to High) and select a product card to view its detail page

incoming_params.description: Product category to browse, e.g., "water" or "dispensers". Used to load appropriate filters and products.
Search query string. When present, the page uses searchProducts instead of a pure category listing.
Current results page for pagination.
Sort field, e.g., "price" or "rating".
Sort direction, typically "asc" or "desc".
Comma-separated list of size_filter_keys (e.g., "5_gallon,1_l"). Drives the Size filter.
Comma-separated list of water_type values (e.g., "spring,sparkling"). Drives the Type filter.
Comma-separated list of packaging_category values (e.g., "bottled_cases,refillable_jugs").
Minimum price filter value.
Maximum price filter value.
Minimum average rating to filter products, e.g., 4.5.
When true, filter to eco-friendly products only.
When true, filter to BPA-free products only.
Filter to case products when true.
Filter to rental products when true (used for Dispensers & Coolers rental filter).
Filter to products that support subscriptions.
Filter to products that support one-time purchase.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click any product card in the listing
Change filters, sort option, or pagination on the water category listing
Click cart icon in header while on the product listing
Click site logo in header

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Shop Water" and "Dispensers & Coolers" links with a categoryId parameter
Direct access with category and/or search parameters in the query string

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single product, including purchase, subscription, or rental options.
primary_functions: Show full product information such as size, type, case/jug details, ratings, and eco-friendly badges
Let users select purchase mode (one-time, subscription, or rental where applicable) and configure options like quantity, frequency, delivery day, or rental duration
Add configured product, subscription, or rental to the cart

incoming_params.description: Product ID whose details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View Cart" button after adding an item or click the cart icon in header
Click breadcrumb link back to the water product listing (retains original filters client-side)
Click site logo in header

access_methods.description: Accessed when user navigates to product_detail.html?id={productId}
Linked from product cards on Home and Product Listing pages

pages.name: Deals & Promo Codes
pages.description: Central page listing all current promotions and promo codes for one-time orders and subscriptions.
primary_functions: List active deals with key details such as discount percentage, eligibility (one-time orders, subscriptions), and any conditions
Allow users to filter or visually distinguish deals applicable to one-time orders versus subscriptions
Open a promotion detail panel or section to show full terms and provide a Copy Promo Code action

incoming_params.description: Optional promotion ID. When present, the page auto-opens the detail panel for the specified promo.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Go to cart" or cart icon after copying a promo code
Click site logo to return to the homepage
Click "Shop Water" CTA from a one-time order promo card

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Deals & Promo Codes" in header navigation
Accessible via "Deals & Promo Codes" footer link
Optional promoId parameter deep-links directly to a specific promo on this page

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart where users review items, adjust quantities, apply promo codes, and proceed to checkout.
primary_functions: Display all cart items including one-time products, subscriptions, and rentals with quantities and subtotals
Allow users to change quantities or remove items and update the cart totals
Provide a promo code input field to apply discounts to eligible items
Offer a Checkout button to move into the checkout flow

incoming_params.description: Optional promo code to auto-apply when the cart page loads.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Checkout" button
Click "Continue shopping" link to continue browsing water products
Click site logo to return to homepage from cart

access_methods.description: Accessible via the cart icon shown in the header on all pages
Optional promoCode parameter allows deep-linking with a prefilled promo code

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Multi-step checkout page to confirm delivery details, review order, and place the order.
primary_functions: Collect or confirm delivery address, using existing saved addresses where available
Allow users to choose delivery date within available windows (including earliest date within 7 days) and select delivery time slots and methods (e.g., Standard delivery)
Show order summary including items, rentals, subscriptions, discounts, and totals and submit the order to receive confirmation

outgoing_connections.trigger: Successful submission of the checkout form using placeOrder
Click "Back to cart" / "Edit cart" link from checkout

access_methods.description: Reached by clicking the "Checkout" button on the Cart page
User can return to an in-progress checkout by navigating directly to checkout.html

pages.name: Help Center
pages.description: Support hub with searchable help topics and FAQs about orders, subscriptions, and policies.
primary_functions: Provide a search bar to find help content by keywords (e.g., minimum order amount)
List popular or categorized help topics and FAQs
Link to detailed help articles for specific topics

incoming_params.description: Optional search term to pre-populate the Help Center search and auto-run a search.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a help article link or search result
Click site logo to return to homepage

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Help" link in header navigation
Accessible via "Help Center" link in the footer
Optional query parameter deep-links to specific search results

pages.name: Help Article
pages.description: Dedicated page for a single help or FAQ article with full details.
primary_functions: Display the content of a specific help article, such as the minimum order amount policy
Offer navigation back to the Help Center and links to related articles

incoming_params.description: Slug of the help article to display, e.g., "minimum-order-amount".

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Help Center" link
Click a related article link in the sidebar
Click site logo in header

access_methods.description: Accessed as help_article.html?slug={slug} from Help Center search results
May be linked directly from emails or external support channels using the slug

pages.name: My Account Overview
pages.description: Overview page for account-related tools, summarizing subscriptions, deliveries, and addresses.
primary_functions: Show a snapshot of active subscriptions, upcoming deliveries, and default address
Provide clear navigation links to manage subscriptions, addresses, and upcoming deliveries

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "My Subscriptions" card or link in the account overview
Click "Manage addresses" in the account overview
Click "View all upcoming deliveries" in the overview
Click site logo

access_methods.description: Accessible via "My Account" link in header navigation
User can navigate directly to account.html

pages.name: My Subscriptions
pages.description: Management page listing all existing subscriptions with quick access to edit them.
primary_functions: Display a list of active and paused subscriptions with key details such as product, frequency, quantity, and next delivery date
Allow users to select a subscription to manage by clicking a Manage or Edit button that opens the Subscription Detail page

incoming_params.description: Optional filter for subscription status, e.g., "active" or "paused".

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Manage" / "Edit" on a subscription row
Click breadcrumb link back to My Account

access_methods.description: Accessible via "My Subscriptions" footer link
Linked from My Account overview subscriptions section
Optional status query parameter controls which subscriptions are shown by default

pages.name: Subscription Detail
pages.description: Detail and edit page for a single subscription's settings.
primary_functions: Allow users to change subscription settings including delivery frequency (e.g., every week, every 2 weeks), quantity, delivery day, and delivery address
Save changes to the subscription and return the user to the My Subscriptions list
Display the current subscription status and next scheduled delivery summary

incoming_params.description: ID of the subscription whose settings are being managed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Subscriptions" link after saving or cancelling changes
Click "View upcoming deliveries" from subscription summary

access_methods.description: Accessed as subscription_detail.html?subscriptionId={subscriptionId} from the My Subscriptions page
Linked from subscription summaries or notifications

pages.name: Addresses
pages.description: Address book for managing delivery locations.
primary_functions: List all saved addresses with labels such as Home or Office and indicate the default address
Provide a form to add a new address (e.g., name, street, city, state, ZIP) and save it
Allow editing or deleting existing addresses

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click breadcrumb or "Back to My Account" link
Click "View upcoming deliveries" after adding or editing an address

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Addresses" / "Manage addresses" link in My Account overview
User can navigate directly to addresses.html

pages.name: Upcoming Deliveries
pages.description: Schedule view showing all upcoming deliveries with options to reschedule.
primary_functions: Display a chronological list of upcoming deliveries with date, time window, items, and delivery address
Offer a Reschedule action for each delivery that opens a form on the page to change address, date (via date picker), and time window
Confirm and save updated delivery schedules for selected deliveries

incoming_params.description: Optional delivery ID to focus and pre-open the reschedule UI for a specific delivery.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click breadcrumb link back to My Account overview
Click "Manage addresses" from the reschedule form if the needed address is not listed

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Upcoming Deliveries" footer link
Linked from My Account upcoming deliveries summary
Optional deliveryId parameter allows deep-linking to reschedule a specific delivery

pages.name: Order Confirmation
pages.description: Confirmation page shown after a successful checkout.
primary_functions: Confirm that the order has been placed and display order details including items, delivery date/time, and address
Provide links back to the Home page, My Account overview, or Upcoming Deliveries for further management

incoming_params.description: ID of the order that was just placed; used to display confirmation details.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Continue shopping"
Click "Go to My Account"
Click "View delivery schedule"

access_methods.description: User is redirected here after a successful placeOrder call
Order confirmation can be revisited directly as order_confirmation.html?orderId={orderId}

pages.name: About
pages.description: Company information and overview of the bottled water delivery service.
primary_functions: Explain the companys mission, service area, and sustainability efforts (e.g., eco-friendly and refillable options)
Build trust by highlighting quality standards and customer service guarantees

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Contact us" CTA from About page content
Click site logo in header

access_methods.description: Accessible via "About" link in footer
User can navigate directly to about.html; the page internally loads content with pageSlug="about"

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact page for customer inquiries and support requests.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form for users to submit questions or feedback
Display alternative contact details such as phone number, email address, and service hours

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Visit Help Center" from the Contact page
Click site logo in header

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Contact" footer link
Submitting the contact form uses submitContactRequest but remains on this page with confirmation

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the website, orders, subscriptions, and rentals.
primary_functions: Present the legal terms and conditions for purchases, subscriptions, and dispenser rentals
Allow users to review specific sections such as billing, cancellations, and delivery policies

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click cross-link to Privacy Policy
Click site logo

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Terms & Conditions" footer link
User can navigate directly to terms.html; content loaded internally with pageSlug="terms"

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Information on how user data is collected, used, and protected.
primary_functions: Explain what personal data is collected and for what purposes (orders, delivery, account management)
Describe user rights and how to request data access, correction, or deletion

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click cross-link to Terms & Conditions
Click site logo

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Privacy Policy" footer link
User can navigate directly to privacy.html; content loaded internally with pageSlug="privacy"

header_links.description: Homepage with featured products and global navigation
Browse all bottled water products with filters
Browse water dispensers and coolers, including rentals
View and copy current promotions and promo codes
Access subscriptions, addresses, and upcoming deliveries
Open the Help Center for FAQs and support articles

footer_links.description: Learn about the company and service
Get in touch with customer support
See current discounts and promo codes
Read the terms of service for orders and rentals
Understand how your data is handled
